bot_credentials.consequence: No Wikipedia edits possible from this account. All draft work is frozen until block is resolved or a different path is found.

decline_history.note: Second decline: person not shown to meet notability guidelines

reviewer_comments.Theroadislong: In 20 years of editing here I've not come across this referencing style...and YouTube and Vimeo are not considered reliable sources
reviewer_comments.Bearcat: Notability doesn't hinge on the existence of the subject's work, it hinges on the WP:GNG-worthy quality of the referencing. We have to see media coverage about him and his work (as in newspapers, magazines, books), while YouTube or Vimeo videos, the self-published websites of companies or organizations he's been directly affiliated with, blogs and other Wikipedia articles are not acceptable or GNG-building references.
reviewer_comments.Paul_W: IMDb is not a reliable source (see WP:IMDB)

autobiography_tag.note: Tag reflects COI concern. Neverendersinc is the editing account for artonly.io, which has published about Le Blanc. Cannot remove tag while blocked.

Draft:Amos Le Blanc.next_action_detail: The Neverendersinc account is indefinitely blocked. Wikipedia work on this draft is frozen. Options: (1) appeal the block directly with Asilvering or another admin from a human account, (2) wait for organic press coverage and have an unaffiliated Wikipedia editor create the article, (3) accept that the article cannot proceed via this route.
